sourcesContent:
export const legacyItems = [
  {
    id: "social-club",
    icon: "🏛️",
    title: "Portuguese Canadian Social Club of Chatham",
    years: "1971 – Present",
    description: "Co-founded the Portuguese Canadian Social Club of Chatham in 1971, serving as its first President. The club became a cornerstone of cultural life for the Portuguese community in Southwestern Ontario and remains active to this day.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "conselho",
    icon: "🤝",
    title: "Conselho das Comunidades Portuguesas",
    years: "1979 – 2003",
    description: "Served for over 20 years as a member of the Conselho das Comunidades Portuguesas, representing the Portuguese Canadian community in Ontario and Manitoba. Held the position of President, advocating for Portuguese Canadian rights at provincial, federal, and Portuguese government levels.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "travel",
    icon: "✈️",
    title: "Forno's Travel Agency",
    years: "1977 – 2009",
    description: "Founded and operated Forno's Travel Agency in Chatham, Leamington, and Windsor for over 30 years, primarily serving the Portuguese community. The agency was a lifeline connecting families with their homeland.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "notary",
    icon: "⚖️",
    title: "Notary Public",
    years: "1977 – 2018",
    description: "Appointed as Notary Public by the Ontario government, serving the documentation needs of the Southwestern Ontario Portuguese community for over 40 years. He helped countless families navigate the legal complexities of life in a new country.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "consul",
    icon: "🇵🇹",
    title: "Honorary Consul of Portugal",
    years: "1998",
    description: "Named Honorary Consul of Portugal in 1998 — one of the highest honours bestowed upon a member of the Portuguese Canadian community, recognizing his decades of service bridging two nations.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "language",
    icon: "📚",
    title: "Portuguese Language Education",
    years: "1970s – 1990s",
    description: "Helped establish Portuguese language classes in Chatham, Leamington, Wheatley, and surrounding communities — initially funded by the Portuguese government, then by the Canadian government — ensuring the next generation could learn their language, culture, and history.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "fatima",
    icon: "⛪",
    title: "Nossa Senhora da Fátima Festa",
    years: "1979 – Present",
    description: "Helped establish the Nossa Senhora da Fátima Festa in Chatham in 1979. He was personally responsible for having the Our Lady of Fátima statue made in Portugal, blessed at the Shrine of Fátima, and brought to Canada. The festival has run for over 40 years.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  },
  {
    id: "knights",
    icon: "⚔️",
    title: "Knights of Columbus",
    years: "1970s – 2025",
    description: "Volunteered with the Knights of Columbus for over 40 years, attaining the rank of Fourth Degree Knight — the highest honour in the organization.",
    photo: null,
    photoCaption: null
  }
];

export const honors = [
  {
    title: "Medalha de Mérito das Comunidades Portuguesas",
    issuer: "Portuguese Government",
    description: "Personally presented by Secretary of State José Cesário in recognition of exceptional service to the Portuguese Canadian community."
  },
  {
    title: "Honorary Consul of Portugal",
    issuer: "Government of Portugal",
    year: "1998",
    description: "Named Honorary Consul of Portugal, one of the highest distinctions awarded to a Portuguese Canadian community leader."
  },
  {
    title: "Certificate of Exemplary Service to Canada",
    issuer: "Government of Canada",
    year: "2023",
    description: "Awarded in honour of the Coronation of His Majesty King Charles III, recognizing extraordinary contribution and service to the community."
  },
  {
    title: "Fourth Degree Knight",
    issuer: "Knights of Columbus",
    year: "2003",
    description: "The highest honour awarded by the Knights of Columbus, recognizing a lifetime of service and dedication."
  },
  {
    title: "Listed in Who's Who in Portuguese Communities",
    issuer: "Portuguese Communities Publication",
    year: "1989",
    description: "Recognized among the most prominent and influential members of Portuguese communities across North America."
  },
  {
    title: "Volunteer Service Awards",
    issuer: "Province of Ontario & City of Chatham",
    description: "Received multiple volunteer service awards from the Province of Ontario and the City of Chatham for decades of community service."
  }
];
